FreeAgent:

SWDC 2011 Video: Mobile UI Design - Web or Native

Posted on 17 November 2011 by Johannes Fahrenkrug. Tags: iPhone Conferences Design

I was invited to talk about mobile UI design at this year's wonderful Scandinavian Web Developers Conference in Stockholm. It was a great conference and I enjoyed it immensely! My talk was recorded and you can watch it right here in the comfort of your home!

Johannes Fahrenkrug - Mobile UI Design - Web or Native from SWDC on Vimeo.
